raw.message: 🔒 Lock on. 🎯 Fire. 💥 Destroy the enemy in real PvP matches.

hook.summary: High-speed aerial dogfight under a bridge with explosions.
hook.visual_action: A fighter jet flies low under a bridge while dodging incoming fire and explosions.

scene_flow: Jet maneuvers under a bridge amidst heavy fire and laser beams.
Close-up of jet engines and rapid-fire gun combat in a sunset sky.
High-speed chase through a desert canyon with multiple explosions and missile trails.
Jet performs evasive maneuvers to dodge a homing missile in the night sky.
End card showing the game logo and 'PLAY NOW FOR FREE' call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy high-intensity flight simulators and aerial combat games.
